name: MoonPay
description: Card, bank transfer, Apple Pay, and Google Pay on-ramp that asks for your wallet address during checkout and sends the crypto there.

name: Ramp Network
description: Direct-to-wallet on-ramp for U.S. users. You enter your wallet address and Ramp sends the purchased asset there.

name: Transak
description: Direct wallet on-ramp. You enter your wallet address or open it from a supported wallet integration and Transak delivers the crypto there.

name: Banxa
description: Fiat on-ramp that can send purchased crypto to the wallet address you provide when the partner flow does not use a built-in wallet.
